visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A woman with long dark hair, wearing a white safety helmet and a neon yellow high-visibility safety vest over a black sleeveless top, is shown in a close-up shot. Her eyes are partially closed, expressing a sense of exhaustion or shock, while large red and yellow stylized text overlays the center of the frame. The background is an indoor retail environment with shelves and clothing racks visible but slightly out of focus. (2) The scene shifts to a medium shot where the woman is standing behind a wooden counter in a retail space. She reaches toward cardboard boxes stacked on shelves to her left. A shutter door is visible in the background. White informative text appears in the center-left. (3) The woman faces the camera directly, gesturing with her right hand, pointing upward and then spreading both hands outward. She maintains an energetic and friendly facial expression with a constant smile. The setting appears to be a pop-up store with various apparel items hanging on racks and red plastic bins in the background. (4) Multiple jump cuts show the woman continuing her explanation, leaning on the counter, and clasping her hands together. The lighting is bright and even, characteristic of a shopping mall. In the final seconds, she points toward the camera with a confident smile, emphasizing her point.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Variety]: 噴了一百多萬. (2) [Slogan]: 信義區 DREAM PLAZA快閃櫃. [Subtitle]: 老闆娘你這次又花了多少錢. (3) [Subtitle]: 噴了100多萬. [Variety]: 太多了吧!!! (4) [Slogan]: 必須支持起來!. [Subtitle]: 你們是不是有空要好好的來. (5) [Subtitle]: 拍拍照 逛逛看啊. (6) [Subtitle]: 等一下人家又說你 亂花錢. [Variety]: 亂花錢. (7) [Subtitle]: 沒有亂花錢. [Variety]: 澄清!!! (8) [Subtitle]: 只是因為我們是做電商. (9) [Subtitle]: 就是你只能在網路上 看到我們的商品. (10) [Subtitle]: 所以有這種實體店的機會 一定要出來跟大家見面. [Variety]: 太貼心了吧!!! (11) [Subtitle]: 而且真的要摸摸看才知道. (12) [Slogan]: 台灣製造. [Subtitle]: 真的好. [Variety]: 真的好.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: One main female creator in a safety vest, and one off-camera male interviewer whose hand and side are occasionally visible.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A woman with long black hair, wearing a white construction hard hat, a yellow and silver reflective safety vest, and a black sleeveless shirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A temporary retail pop-up stall within a larger mall or commercial space. It features wooden counters, cardboard shipping boxes on shelves, clothing racks with apparel, and bright indoor overhead lighting.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a female voice speaking in an energetic, high-arousal tone with clear articulation. A background music track with a steady electronic beat and upbeat synth textures is audible at a moderate volume. A sharp 'ding' sound effect coincides with the visual mention of a large sum of money. (2) An off-camera male voice with a lower pitch and inquisitive tone asks a question, creating a conversational dynamic. The BGM continues with a consistent tempo of approximately 128 BPM. The ambient noise floor is low, suggesting a controlled indoor environment like a quieted retail floor. (3) The female speaker responds with a playful, defensive tone, her pitch variability increasing as she emphasizes that the money was spent for a purpose. There are brief pauses between phrases for dramatic effect. The sound of clothing or fabric rustling is subtly present as she moves behind the counter. (4) The female voice transitions into a more informative and persuasive narrative style. The music remains steady, providing a constant energetic pulse. The spectral brightness is high, emphasizing the clarity of the speech. A final bubble pop SFX marks a transition in the dialogue.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Question -> Explanation -> Value Proposition
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to promote a physical pop-up store for an e-commerce brand called DREAM PLAZA. By using a 'hard hat' and a 'huge investment' narrative hook, the creator emphasizes the scale and quality of the project to invite online customers to visit and experience products in person.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The speaker explicitly identifies as the 'boss lady' of the brand and encourages viewers to visit the physical counter.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses typical social-media short-form hooks and high-density text to maintain engagement for a commercial promotion.
